hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '').strip()
for m in re.finditer(r'(?<![a-zA-Z0-9_])(grep|rg)(\\s|$)', cmd):
    pos = m.start()
    before = cmd[:pos].rstrip()
    if not before.endswith('|'):
        print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'permissionDecision': 'deny', 'permissionDecisionReason': 'Use the Grep tool instead of grep/rg in Bash. This enforces token-efficient search and consistent tool usage.'}}))
        break
"
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && case "$f" in *.py) uv run pyright "$f" 2>&1 | tail -10 ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
